insured is a commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and
mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas, headquartered
in Dallas, with approximately 24 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Commercial
Commercial Property: Property coverage on a blanket basis with agreed value endorsement.
The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period.
Over the review period, the insured has incurred 3 total claims with $259,081.54 in total paid losses
and $303,232.60 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 2 have been closed.

doc.rendered_text:
Texas Commercial Insurance Partners
 Sandra Villareal, Vice President



 03/15/2026


 RE: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP — Transfer Submission
 2200 Ross Avenue, Suite 4500, Dallas, TX, 75201

 To: Underwriting Department, Apex Managing General Agency


 Dear Underwriting Team,



 Account Overview
 We are pleased to submit Lone Star Property Holdings, LP for your review and consideration. The
 insured is a commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and
 mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas, headquartered
 in Dallas, with approximately 24 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Commercial
 Property.


 Coverage Requested
 Commercial Property: Property coverage on a blanket basis with agreed value endorsement.
 Wind/hail deductible applies per schedule.



 Loss History Summary
 The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period.
 Over the review period, the insured has incurred 3 total claims with $259,081.54 in total paid losses
 and $303,232.60 total incurred. Currently, 1 claim remains open and 2 have been closed.

 Annualized loss ratio is 25.0% (avg annual incurred $101,077.53 against current annual premium
 $403,697.14 over 3 loss years).



 Risk Highlights
 • Background checks and MVR reviews are conducted annually for all employees in safety-sensitive
 positions.

 • The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually.

 • The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor
 agreements.

 • All facilities maintain current fire suppression and sprinkler systems inspected annually by certified
 contractors.




CONFIDENTIAL                                       Page 1 of 2
  • All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitoring services.

 • 24 years of continuous operations under consistent management demonstrates operational
 stability.

 • With 145 employees and a structured HR program, the insured maintains low turnover and
 consistent safety training.



 Broker Recommendation
 We believe this account represents a well-managed risk and look forward to establishing a strong
 partnership.

 Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions or if additional information is required.



 Respectfully submitted,



 Sandra Villareal
 Vice President
 Texas Commercial Insurance Partners




CONFIDENTIAL                                    Page 2 of 2
